summary: M.S. Financial Engineering student at UIUC (Aug 2025 – Dec 2026) building on a B.S. in Mathematics (UIUC) and an M.S. in Mathematics (Rutgers). Experience spans wealth-management internship work, AI dataset validation for LLM training, and datathons and modeling work in credit risk, crypto forecasting, and options/ML coursework. Comfortable shipping pipelines with classical ML, time series, and LLM tooling.
summary_zh: 伊利诺伊大学香槟分校金融工程硕士在读（2025年8月—2026年12月）。本科为 UIUC 数学学士，曾在罗格斯大学取得数学硕士学位。经历涵盖证券公司财富管理部门实习、面向大语言模型训练的数学数据集校验，以及信用风险、加密市场、期权定价与机器学习等方向的建模与竞赛实践；能够落地经典机器学习、时间序列与大语言模型相关工具链。
related_coursework: Machine Learning in Fin Lab, Statistical Methods in Finance, Abstract Linear Algebra, Linear Algebra with Computational Applications, Methods of Applied Statistics, Systems Programming, Linear Optimization
related_coursework_zh: 金融机器学习实验课、金融统计方法、抽象线性代数、计算与应用线性代数、应用统计方法、系统编程、线性优化等
